name: pm-portal
description: People Manager Alignment Portal - Root scripts

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: start cmd /k "cd backend && node node_modules/ts-node-dev/lib/bin.js --respawn --transpile-only src/server.ts" && start cmd /k "cd frontend && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js"
